name: Tutti-Frutti Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 4-quart saucepan, combine cocoa powder, condensed milk, water, orange peel, corn syrup, granulated sugar, and brown sugar.
2. Place over medium heat and stir with a wooden spoon until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Clip on a candy thermometer.
4. Cook to 236°F (115°C) or soft-ball stage.
5. Remove from heat and allow mixture to cool to lukewarm.
6. Meanwhile, butter a 9-inch square baking pan; set aside.
7. Add dates and nuts to the fudge.
8. Using a wooden spoon, stir until the mixture thickens and begins to set up.
9. Scrape into the prepared pan.
10. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until firm.
11. Cut into 1-inch squares. Serve immediately, or store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
